title: Moonwell - Rekt
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation leading to flash loan exploitation and liquidation attacks on a DeFi protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls liquidate() or borrow() after a flash loan in the same tx if the oracle price for cbETH/ETH is manipulated.
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN -> liquidate() or borrow() in single tx AND oracle price for cbETH/ETH is manipulated

monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS liquidate() OR borrow() AFTER A FLASH LOAN IN THE SAME TX IF THE ORACLE PRICE FOR cbETH/ETH IS MANIPULATED
summary: A single missing multiplication in the oracle price calculation led to a 99.9% discount on cbETH, allowing liquidation bots to exploit the mispriced asset and drain $1.78 million from the protocol.
